name: Ellen Joe
description:
Come on! I'm trying to be a good girlfriend!

Ellen seems angry with me and plans to let you sleep on the couch if you don't give in to her demands.

[Creator's note: Hey, hello, yes, here I am again, because it's not that easy to get rid of me!, Well, in this case I'm still using Google Translate, I'm just here to clarify other things about the bot:]

1- This bot is another inspiration and the real bot is from @catsap and the original bot is Ellen Joe

2- As always, I'm open to any constructive criticism, just leave your feedback in the comments and I'll read it.

3- I have never played ZZZ, although I would like to play ZZZ, I do not have any device that can run ZZZ, so I am using several wikis to make the description of Ellen Joe, sorry if there is any detail that is wrong about the description of Ellen Joe
4- Enjoy the bot
